programme.sub-title: Malcolm Gladwell Hits the Tipping Point While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.desc: Elizabeth Olsen is an actress from "Wind River," "Ingrid Goes West" and the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: Halsey discusses her friendship with John Mayer, breaks down spooky New Jersey lore and admits that she was more nervous for "Hot Ones" than her own album release.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: Australian superstar Jacob Elordi takes on the wings of death and discusses the influence of Marlon Brando, sitting courtside at MSG with Simu Liu and rock-bottom auditions.

programme.desc: The gregarious crooner and beloved "Hot Ones" legend T-Pain slams flats and drums while discussing his cartoon Mount Rushmore, his triumph on the "Masked Singer" and much more.

programme.title: 12 In A Box
programme.desc: 12 IN A BOX is a British comedy about 12 former school friends who come together for a reunion to win £1 million each. They must work together to keep peace and work towards their payday. However, they face challenges like an untimely death, a kidnapping plot, another corpse, burglars, and a visit from the boys in blue.

programme.title: Dan In Real Life
programme.desc: Raising three young daughters single-handedly and juggling the problems of America as a respected advice columnist, Dan Burns (Steve Carell - The 40 Year Old Virgin, Get Smart) would be the perfect father, if only he could follow his own advice.

programme.title: Love Birds
programme.desc: Doug is left heartbroken when his girlfriend Susan calls off their relationship. One day, he comes across an injured duck and decides to take it to a vet, who he starts developing feelings for.

programme.title: 12 In A Box
programme.desc: 12 IN A BOX is a British comedy about 12 former school friends who come together for a reunion to win £1 million each. They must work together to keep peace and work towards their payday. However, they face challenges like an untimely death, a kidnapping plot, another corpse, burglars, and a visit from the boys in blue.

programme.title: Man Refuses To Be Father
programme.desc: Desperate to adopt, Amy and John take in Michael, a troubled boy with a history of driving away foster families. Despite Michael's mischievous pranks, the couple discovers his painful past of rejection, solidifying their bond and leading to his permanent adoption.

programme.title: 13-Year-Old Robs Bank for Vision Pro
programme.desc: Mikey disguises himself as his dad to steal his college fund for an Apple Vision Pro. His mom stages a fake arrest to teach him that bad choices always lead to even worse consequences.

programme.title: Poor Girl Is Shamed for Cheap Gifts
programme.desc: Amy hides her poverty from her wealthy best friend, Carmen, to fit in. Rival Brandy exposes Amy's fake designer bag, but is then arrested for fraud. Amy reconciles with Carmen and finds true value.

programme.title: Toxic Friends Don't Know Friend Is Secretly Famous
programme.desc: After being bullied for his weight and mocked for his dream of stand-up, lawyer Jonah quits his job. Guided by comedian Lauren, he finds success and proves his toxic friends and ex-girlfriend wrong.

programme.title: Girl Is Dumped Then Becomes a Millionaire
programme.desc: After her fiancé Alex fires her and leaves her for her best friend, Hannah seeks revenge by teaming up with his estranged brother, Logan. She finds true success and love where she least expected it.

programme.title: She Takes the Worst Job in the World
programme.desc: Ambitious lawyer Rachel joins a prestigious all-female firm, choosing wealth over family. She soon discovers her bosses are a literal witch coven using dark magic to win cases and steal her youth.

programme.title: Teen Wants To Be Somebody Else
programme.desc: Plain Anh, ostracized at school, transforms herself with Kim's help, gaining confidence and popularity. When she discovers her new "friends" are using her, Anh orchestrates their downfall, reuniting with Kim and embracing true friendship.

programme.title: Teacher Is Secretly A Pop Star
programme.desc: Audrey, a tomboy drummer, faces a prejudiced music teacher and unsupportive mom. But when her teacher reveals her true identity as a famous pop star and her own journey of overcoming judgment, Audrey gains the confidence to shine.

programme.title: Influencers Mocked For Renting House
programme.desc: Brooke and Marco, escaping poverty, move into a new home but face judgment from a snobby neighbor, Tia, who exposes their financial struggles online. Despite setbacks, their honesty and community support lead them to unexpected success and their dream home.

programme.title: Family Holiday Party Goes Too Far
programme.desc: Drew, a talented artist, is stifled by his materialistic family's disapproval and insecurity. With the help of Holly, a struggling single mom, they inspire each other to embrace their true worth, find success, and stand up to their judgmental families.

programme.title: Brother and Sister Face Off
programme.desc: A rebellious teen, Kazi, resents his dad's new girlfriend, Janelle, and her perfect daughter, Kim. Through sabotaging their new family, Kazi indirectly improves himself, realizing their positive influence, and works to bring them back together.

programme.title: Kid Won't Go To Sleep At Night
programme.desc: Teen Jay, refusing to follow his bedtime rules, pulls an all-nighter, only to ruin his important audition. Humiliated and exhausted, he finally learns to appreciate his mother's rules and the importance of rest.

programme.title: Kid Steals Tickets At Fun Center

programme.desc: After being bullied in her past, Jen relies on online communities to establish relationships. After meeting Skylar online, they immediately hit it off. But they've never met in person!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Chris Pratt and Millie Bobby Brown settle some of pop culture's biggest debates, arguing over the length of award season speeches and who would last longer in a zombie apocalypse, and Millie reveals who her go-to celebrity impression is!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Paul Mescal and Andrew Scott settle some age-old debates about whether bowling is embarrassing, what the best form of potato is, and share their very strong opinions on the immediate banning of karaoke and personalised number plates.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Find out if Ewan McGregor and Hayden Christensen think the Star Wars prequels were underrated, if they believe Darth Vader is the best villain in movie history and if they think the Star Wars universe and their fanbase are the best.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: We're putting football rivalries head to head in the ultimate debate show! In this episode, Robbie Lyle, the don of Arsenal Fan TV, goes head to head with legendary Man United fan Andy Tate.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Chelsea fan Savage Dan tells Manchester City fan Buvey why he thinks Erling Haaland is overrated. The two argue over some of the biggest debates between the two Premier League sides, including who was better: Drogba or Agüero?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Selena Gomez and Zoe Saldaña tackle some of our audience's biggest debates by arguing whether Janice from Friends was as annoying as we all thought and whether you should grab dinner on a first date.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Man City legend Micah Richards and former Liverpool and Spurs player Jamie Redknapp debate some of the Premier League and England's biggest football debates, such as who is England's Greatest Ever Player: Rooney, Kane, or Beckham?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Spurs fan Flav goes up against Chelsea fan Rory Jennings to debate the biggest arguments between the two London rivals, including whether Tottenham Hotspur will finish above Chelsea this season, and is Harry Kane the best Striker in Premier League history?

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Tom Holland and Zendaya argue over some of the internet's biggest debates! We find out their views on whether pineapple should be on pizza, if American Football is better than Soccer and Zendaya reveals what qualities make Tom a great Spider-Man!

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this week's episode, ex-career criminal John Burton, a.k.a 'Juice Bomb John', recounts how he began a life of crime in the 90's Liverpool rave scene, smuggled millions of pounds worth of black market goods into the UK, and reformed to develop an app helping people find work after leaving the prison system.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Patrick Foster's gambling addiction had catastrophic consequences on his career and family life. Here, he tells us about his internal battle with addiction, the millions he's placed in bets, and the vast sums of debt that he racked up as a result.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Jamie Morgan Kane spent 34 years in the California Prison System for a murder he claims he did not commit. Here, he tells us about his tumultuous childhood, his time serving in the Vietnam War and the series of events that led to his arrest.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Nathalie Schöffmann recounts her experience of surviving a kidnapping after being attacked and bundled into the boot of a car while out cycling. She describes the conversation that helped her to escape and why she has empathy for her kidnapper.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Rachel Williams survived 18 years of domestic abuse at the hands of her husband, Darren. She tells us how his manipulation and coercive control quickly developed into violent attacks, but highlights that there can be life after domestic abuse.

programme.title: Honesty Box: Episode 40
programme.desc: Former royal butler Grant Harrold answers anonymous questions, revealing what life is really like inside the Royal Family, from daily routines and etiquette to behind-the-scenes stories and misconceptions about the monarchy.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Raphael Rowe, an innocent man wrongfully imprisoned for murder.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode we hear from Pam Fraser, a nudist, who tells us all about the advantages of living a naked life.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: UFC Star Alexander Volkanovski joins us for Snack Wars: UK v Australia. The fighter reveals the proper way to eat TimTams, faces off with the legendary Vegemite, and tries some UK flavours like Gentleman's Relish and pickled onion Space Raiders. Former footballers, Real Madrid Galáctico star Roberto Carlos and Arsenal Invincible player Gilberto Silva, try Pimm's for the first time with Caipirinha cocktails, compare British and Brazilian beer and share their love for Frazzles and Torresmos.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Anya Taylor-Joy and Alexander Skarsgård choose between UK and Swedish vegan snacks in this entertaining episode of Snack Wars! They compare Greggs sausage rolls to Swedish meatballs and fruit gums to a Swedish snack called Djungelvrål. Zac Efron and Ryan Kiera Armstrong compare UK and USA snacks! Zac has a hilarious reaction to Toxic Waste, Ryan tries her first-ever Twinkie, and they both can't get enough of British snacks!

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E28
programme.desc: Inspired by a demonstration of an electric garage door, Samantha opens her garage by twitching her nose. Plagued by Gladys about this, Abner questions Darrin. To cover up, Darrin foregoes new fishing gear and buys a remote control for the garage. When radio signals from passing planes operate the door at random, Samantha asks Darrin to return the device and use the money for fishing gear. Darrin refuses to believe Samantha and she swears never to use magic again. Later, Samantha and Darrin are t...

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E29
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz catches Samantha twitching her nose to rearrange pictures on a wall.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E30
programme.desc: Darrin lends a helping hand to D. D. (Danger) O'Riley, a beautiful nineteen-year-old neighbor. As Darrin spends more and more time with D.D., Samantha turns to solitaire. Endora sees a chance to break up the Stephens marriage. She takes George, a warlock, from his harem and persuades him to romance Samantha. Learning George's purpose, Samantha declares she is perfectly happy married to Darrin. Undaunted, George, in the form of a raven, flies to Darrin's office, where Darrin and Larry Tate are working on a campaign for an electric typewriter. George flies into the room and begins to type on the new machine. Darrin and Larry feel the raven is the perfect image for a series of T.V. commercials. When Samantha tells Darrin who George really is, George materializes into human form and gets mixed up for awhile with D.D. Endora is miffed. When realizing that his witchcraft is powerless against the love Samantha and Darrin have for each other, George returns to his harem.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E32
programme.desc: After an argument, Gladys Kravitz locks her husband out of their home. The Stephens invite Abner to spend the night at their place. Later, when it appears that Abner, using all his privileges as a guest, is more than satisfied with the arrangements and is making no effort to return to his own home, Darrin demands that Samantha take action. Not only is Samantha unsuccessful in all her attempts to effect a reconciliation, but she learns that Gladys wants a divorce. When all else fails, Samantha gets the idea of using sleep therapy to reunite the Kravitzes. Feeling that one of the happiest days of her life is the day a man proposes marriage, and a woman accepts him, Samantha projects Gladys and Abner in their dreams back to that day. Then she awakens them and each begins looking for the other. Later, as Samantha and Darrin look forward to spending an evening at home alone, the Kravitzes arrive to celebrate their reunion.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E33
programme.desc: As Darrin naps in the living room, Endora points out some of the unfortunate details of his face. Samantha at first protests when her mother, using witchcraft, changes Darrin's looks but then adds some touches of her own. Awakening, Darrin demands an explanation. Samantha can't explain why she and Endora were changing his features, and Darrin begins to worry. As the obsession grows, Samantha decides to build up her husband's ego. Changing her own personality, Samantha becomes a French sculptress, Michelle. She tells Darrin his face exudes the masculine appeal she has always tried to find in a model. Darrin turns down Michelle's request that he pose for her, suspecting that she is Samantha. A substitute secretary, Barbara Lucas, appears at the office and Darrin, thinking it is another of Samantha's tricks, makes a play for her, just as Samantha walks in. Her jealous reaction convinces Darrin that Samantha really loves him. Darrin explains be thought she was posing as Barbara, but leaves Samantha with an uncertain feeling.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E35
programme.desc: Samantha and Endora discover the culinary delights of Mario's restaurant. Mario tells them he is going broke because he refuses to sell pizza. Samantha learns that Darrin's agency has a new client, Linton Baldwin, the owner of a large chain of pizza parlors. When Samantha uses witchcraft to get a huge newspaper ad for Mario, and Endora inserts a plug for him on Baldwin's TV program, Baldwin tells Larry Tate he is cancelling his account and signing with the agency handling Mario's restaurant. Realizing Darrin's career is in jeopardy, Samantha persuades Endora to help save the Baldwin account for Darrin. They lay out a spectacular advertising campaign for Baldwin and give the credit to Darrin's agency. Not only does Baldwin ask Darrin's agency to keep his account, but Mario's restaurant becomes a great success.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E36
programme.desc: Almost as determined as Endora to break up Samantha's marriage to a mere mortal, Samantha's cousin Edgar, an elf, begins playing pranks on Darrin. Darrin's agency has been trying to hold onto the Shelley Shoe account. Edgar, invisible to all, plagues Darrin in his office. Darrin is sure Endora is working on him again, and has difficulty persuading Larry Tate to let him present the new campaign to Mr. Shelley. At the sales meeting, Fred Schulwiler, as unscrupulous competitor, almost gets the account when he makes it appear that Darrin is trying to make Mr. Shelley look ridiculous. When Samantha convinces Edgar that she is very happy with Darrin, he switches his attentions to Schulwiler. Before Edgar is through, Schulwiler has lost all chance of landing the Shelley account. Darrin, coming up with an advertising campaign featuring an elf not unlike Edgar, ties up the account for his firm.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E37
programme.desc: Samantha's Aunt Clara arrives on the Stephens' first anniversary with presents for Samantha and Darrin. Casting a spell to adjust a checkered cap she has given Darrin, Aunt Clara uses the wrong words and turns Darrin into a chimpanzee. Unable to remember how to remove the spell, Aunt Clara goes home to look for the formula. When Samantha leaves the house, Endora stays with Darrin. Darrin leaps out of a window and runs into Gladys Kravitz. She takes the chimp back to her house. Soon after, Aunt Clara comes with her book of magic, Samantha returns. Samantha tells Aunt Clara she must find Darrin since her doctor has told her she is going to have a baby. Meanwhile, Gladys and Abner have turned Darrin over to the zoo, where he is caged with three other chimps. Samantha goes to the zoo. Then Aunt Clam arrives and turns Darrin back to his former self. Samantha is finally able to tell him he is to be a father. Later, Gladys begins telling the Stephens about the chimpanzee. Suddenly realizing that Darrin is wearing the same outfit as the chimp, Gladys streaks back to her own house.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E38
programme.desc: Learning that he is about to become a father, Darrin waits on Samantha hand and foot. Then Larry Tate convinces him that all women would make a career out of having a baby if you allowed them to. He gives Darrin a book on the subject which states that the more active the mother, the happier she will be, and the healthier the child. Darrin returns home completely convinced. Endora is infuriated when she hears Darrin ordering Samantha to do chores around the house. The following day, Darrin wakes up with a backache. At an office lunch, he fights for extra pickles. When Samantha learns of this, she faces up to her mother. Endora admits she has cast a spell over Darrin, but will do nothing to change the situation for the present. Darrin, dis-cussing his plight at a bar, becomes obsessed with the idea that he is going to have a baby himself. Finally, Endora removes the spell and Darrin becomes completely attentive to Samantha once more. She agrees with Darrin's assertion that he is one man in a million who knows just how she feels.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S2E39
programme.sub-title: We'Re In For A Bad Spell
programme.desc: When strange things begin happening to Adam Newlarkin, a friend of Darrin's, Aunt Clara tells Samantha he has inherited the spell placed by a witch on his ancestor who was a judge in Salem two hundred years before. Aunt Clara adds that unless Adam follows the antidote for the spell strictly, he will be branded a thief. The Stephens learn that Adam has been hired by a local bank. Samantha and Darrin manage to get Adam to kiss a dog, the first step. With Aunt Clara's help, Darrin dunks Adam in a pool three times. They have trouble persuading him to ride through town shouting praise of witches, which is the final step. However, finding his briefcase stuffed with money , Adam, a true native of Salem, believes he is under a spell. He mounts a horse and starts riding. Bank manager Abercrombie and a detective, having discovered the loss of seventy five thousand dollars, come to the Stephens' home. Aunt Clara makes the money disappear from the briefcase. Abercrombie apologizes to Adam after learning that a bank employee has been taken into custody with the stolen cash.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E22
programme.desc: Endora, hoping to break up her daughter's marriage, superimposes Samantha's face on a print entitled "Maid of Salem:" the print is dated 1690. Darrin buys the print and then begins to worry about the difference between Samantha's age and his own. With Endora planting seeds of doubt at every turn, Darrin visualizes himself as a doddering old man, while Samantha retains her youthful appearance. Everyone, including Larry Tate and the doctor from whom Darrin seeks advice, fails to realize what is troubling him. Then, in a nearby park, Darrin overhears two squirrels to which Endora has given voice talk about their dif-ferences in age. Endora finally admits to Samantha that she can age along with Darrin. Samantha, after telling Darrin she never posed for the picture, tells him that her mother is to blame for their problem. She assures him that they will grow old together, but being in love will never note the difference. As insurance, Samantha uses witchcraft to make the "Maid of Salem" disappear.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E23
programme.desc: The lack of a traffic signal at busy Morning Glory Circle makes it virtually impossible for the Stephens or their neighbors to cross without risking life and limb. Joe Harvey calls a meeting at his home to discuss plans for doing something about it. Darrin makes an ad for a mass rally at the school auditorium to force City Hall to put a traffic light on the corner. However, Samantha has trouble getting Endora to return the traffic signals she has collected. Endora even brings a London bobby to the Stephens' living room. The bobby, of course, has disappeared by the time Gladys Kravitz brings her husband to see him. At the rally, the Mayor tells his constituents a traffic light is unnecessary. However, using her witchcraft, Samantha has the Mayor and his limousine so tied up in a traffic jam that he is convinced a traffic signal is necessary. Endora, as a final touch, brings a modern traffic signal to the Stephens home for the victory celebration. Gladys sees it, but by the time she brings Abner, Samantha makes Endora cause it to vanish.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E24
programme.desc: Samantha tells Endora she doesn't have time for a dress-fitting. Endora solves Samantha's problem by transforming herself into En-Sam, identical to Samantha. Bob Frazer, an author, falls for En-Sam and they do the town together. Meanwhile, Darrin tells Samantha to expect a visit from his friend, Bob Frazer. Gladys Kravitz, who has seen En-Sam with Bob, is sure the Stephens home is about to break up. After Bob sees Samantha and mistakes her for En-Sam, Samantha explains to Endora the trouble she is causing. Endora is convinced when she learns Bob is expected at the Stephens home. All of En-Sam's efforts to break with Bob fail. Bob is determined to have a showdown with Darrin over Samantha. Samantha tells Darrin that Bob has fallen in love with Endora. Endora, still En-Sam, arrives and Bob thinks En-Sam and Samantha are identical twins. Although Endora promises to give Bob Up, Samantha, knowing her mother, is not sure what she will do.

programme.title: Cheeni Kam
programme.desc: Cheeni Kum is a heartwarming romantic drama centered on Buddhadev Gupta, a grumpy 64-year-old chef who runs a top Indian restaurant in London. His life takes a turn when he clashes with Nina Verma, a spirited 34-year-old who critiques his cooking. Realizing his mistake, he apologizes, and the two gradually fall in love despite their 30-year age gap. When Buddhadev travels to Delhi to ask Nina's father for her hand, he is shocked and refuses, disturbed by their age difference—especially since Buddhadev is older than him. In protest, Nina's father begins a satyagraha (fast unto death). The story explores love, age, societal norms, and emotional courage.

programme.title: Doctor Prisoner Ep.15
programme.desc: Ije tells everyone that he intends to get Jaehwan a stay of execution by getting him diagnosed with Huntington's disease, an illness that Lee Deokseong had. When Jaejun begins to threaten Minsk's family, Minsik reaches out to Ije. Uisik finds out a suspicious connection to Taegang while looking into Jeonghui's case.

programme.title: Doctor Prisoner Ep.16
programme.desc: Jaehwan collapses and the regular board meeting is just around the corner. When everyone is gathered together, Ije tells them that this is the last chance to get Jaejun.

programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.1
programme.desc: The Dreams is a frail baseball team continuously landing the last place. In order to have better results the following season, the team finds a new general manager, Seung Su, who, despite having little experience with baseball, has a track record of winning with other sports.

programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.2
programme.desc: Rumors spread that the Dreams' new general manager, Seung Su, is planning to trade the team's most famed player, Dong Gyu, for reasons unbeknownst to the employees. Despite backlash and opposition, Seung Su manages to explain his reasons to the employees and successfully negotiates the trade deal.

programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.3
programme.desc: Seung Su finds something suspicious about a disagreement between Se Hyeok, the scouting division head, and a scouting division member, Won Seop, at the first-year player draft, regarding the team's selection of player Min Ho over Chang Kwon and, tries to seek answers.

programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.4
programme.desc: Seung Su and Se Young call everyone to identify the irregularity of the scouting division. Meanwhile, an unexpected guest visits the office, and their meeting takes a new turn.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.8
programme.desc: Gun shows Mi Young around his office, but Se Ra's unexpected arrival flusters him. He tries to tell Se Ra about his marriage, but Mi Young stops him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.9
programme.desc: Mi Young develops genuine feelings for Gun, and Gun in turn starts to fall for Mi Young's new side. Se Ra asks Mi Young point-blank if she loves Gun, leaving her rattled, while Daniel feels sorry that Mi Young keeps getting the short end of the stick. Gun revises the divorce agreement he drafted with Mi Young.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.10
programme.desc: News about Gun and Mi Young spreads publicly, and Gun is oddly pleased. While rummaging through the house after his plan goes awry, Yong's mom discovers a suspicious set of divorce papers. Learning the marriage is a contract, Se Ra goes to see Gun again, while Mi Young ends up meeting Daniel when Gun doesn't show up to their appointment.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.11
programme.desc: Waking up in the hospital, Gun shows symptoms suggesting a hereditary illness and doesn't remember Mi Young. Though confused and hurt, she stays by his side. Se Ra seizes the chance to be with Gun as much as possible, but as she realizes how strong Gun and Mi Young's bond still is, she feels threatened.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.12
programme.desc: Mi Young attends the final prenatal class alone—until Gun unexpectedly shows up. Gun breaks up with Se Ra, and Se Ra asks Mi Young to break up with Gun. Overwhelmed, Mi Young tells Daniel, who is leaving for France, that she wants to go with him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.13
programme.desc: Mi Young makes a successful exhibition debut with Daniel, and when Gun sees them together, jealousy flares. Chairwoman Wang is still pulling every string to get Gun married, but it isn't easy Se Ra is bitter about their lack of progress. Meanwhile, Mi Young runs into Gun outside her hotel room.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.14
programme.desc: Daniel finally finds the younger sister he has been searching for, and Gun is crestfallen to hear Mi Young plans to return to France. Yong suggests recruiting a female artist as a key strategic move for the company—and recommends Mi Young—but she turns Gun's business proposal down. Meanwhile, Daniel formally proposes to Mi Young.

programme.title: Gaus Electronics Ep.12
programme.desc: Lee Sang-sik, the troublemaker of Marketing Division 3! He's really caused a stir. A video commemorating the 50th anniversary of Gauss, which he had posted as private on his personal channel, was set to public without his knowledge. The small ball Sang-sik set rolling triggered a storm of controversy—leading not only to the chairman's summons by the prosecution but also to the threat of the division's dissolution…

programme.title: Delivery Man Ep.1
programme.desc: While cleaning his taxi, taxi driver Young-min finds a cell phone. He then picks up Ji-hyun, a ghost who has lost her memory. Persuaded by Ji-hyun that ghosts can pay for rides, he begins operating a taxi service exclusively for ghosts, granting their wishes in exchange for fare.

programme.title: Delivery Man Ep.2
programme.desc: In order to grant the wish of Byeong-cheol, the first passenger of the Ghost Taxi, Young-min and Ji-hyun meet with Byeong-cheol's wife. There, they discover that a con artist posing as Byeong-cheol's mother is after his 300 million won workers' compensation payout, and they use their wits to expose the con artist.

programme.title: Delivery Man Ep.3
programme.desc: After discovering his late mother's hair tie on Ji-hyun's wrist, Young-min confronts her, but Ji-hyun—who can't even remember her name—is at a loss. Just then, the phone Ji-hyun is holding runs out of battery, and she finds herself trapped in total darkness.

programme.title: Delivery Man Ep.4
programme.desc: Once her phone was charged, Ji-hyun returned to Young-min's side. The brief separation had made them feel even closer. Frantic over a text message demanding repayment of a loan, Young-min and Ji-hyun head to a hotspot for ghosts in search of taxi fare, where they encounter Shin-woo, a ghost who happens to be Ji-hyun's classmate.

programme.title: Delivery Man Ep.5
programme.desc: While granting Shin-woo's wishes, Young-min realizes he has fallen for Ji-hyun, who is a ghost. Using the information Shin-woo provided, the two work together to find Ji-hyun's family. They obtain an amulet to restore her memory from Dong-wook, the only shaman who can see Ji-hyun, and Ji-hyun gradually begins to regain her memories.

programme.title: Hwarang

programme.title: Hwarang

programme.title: Hwarang

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: The Princess and Aro are selected to be Wonhwa, the two leaders of Hwarang. The Queen plans to use them for controlling Hwarang and get rid of them once they become useless. Meanwhile, Prince Hwikyung asks if Seonu is willing to become a real king and change the world as he desires.

programme.title: Hwarang
programme.desc: Master Hwikyung has finished preparing to make Seonu a new king and is waiting for his decision. programme.title: Hwarang

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Grumman Avenger, which was the most important carrier-based torpedo bomber on American and British carriers throughout the Second World War. They were also the biggest and heaviest carrier aircraft of the conflict.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Junkers Ju 52, which is considered one of the most famous airplanes in history. It was first designed as an airliner, but was used as a transport, bomber, and air ambulance during the Second World War.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Republic P-47 Thunderbolt, a Second World War fighter aircraft produced by the American company Republic Aviation from 1941 until 1945. It was considered a successful high-altitude fighter and also served as the foremost US fighter-bomber in the ground-attack role.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Yakovlev Yak-3, a Second World War Soviet fighter that was regarded for its performance at low altitudes and its agility. It was one of the most successful Soviet aircraft designs of the war.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Hawker Hurricane was the first RAF aircraft to fly over 300mph. Over half of every enemy aeroplane destroyed in the Battle of Britain was by a Hurricane, not a Spitfire.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II. Regarded as one of the most important aircraft of the Cold War. It was a major part of the United States Air Force, Navy and Marine Corps, and was also used by many other countries.

programme.title: The Last Paradises: Patagonia
programme.desc: On the wild coast of Patagonia, the nature calendar describes the most diverse visiting times of fascinating animals, from the southern right whale and other large whales, via the sea lions and elephant seals up to the orcas and millions of penguins. The encounters with whales and their babies are spectacular. Hardly anywhere else on earth can one experience both the brutal and the delightful sides of nature so vividly and so close. The trip to the hot spots for animal watchers and researchers leads us inter alia to the Caleta Valdez. This is where, during the mating season, the southern elephant seals bring their babies into the world, mate and enjoy a little sunbathing on the beach.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer's Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt'?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven't given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let's see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ten of the world's strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan's first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World's Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.desc: This show makes learning the alphabet and numbers a fun adventure with stories, songs, and games. It inspires curiosity and joy, offering kids an engaging and delightful educational experience that keeps them entertained while they learn and grow.

programme.title: Animal Sounds

programme.title: Let's Play Everyday

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a slide game before watching Becky and Jed look for eggs on their farm. Then their mum cooks them for their tea. In Teletubbyland, the Lion and Bear play their hide and seek game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Alex Pascall and some children sing to their dolls to rock them to sleep. Laa-Laa wants to sing a lovely song, but Tinky Winky is crunching his Tubby Toast too loudly!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies march up and down a hill and then they watch some children explore the colour pink. Tinky Winky doesn't know how to make Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa dances with her ball. A little boy tells us why he likes to live in his block of flats. A balloon appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies follow a balloon.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies giggle as they play their 'Through the Arch' game. The windmill stops them to watch a little girl and her dad go for a walk in the town.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the Naughty Pig. Dipsy's hat keeps blowing away and he has to chase it all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa run into Home Hill to say 'Eh-oh', but where 's Po? Some children help their dad to wash his car. They get very wet and soapy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies crawl through the arch in Home Hill and watch Alex Pascall and some children sing 'Handy Hands'.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children play with balls of different shapes and sizes. In Teletubbyland, something happens to Dipsy's hat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are eating Tubby Toast. They play the game 'Two Little Teletubbies', but while they are playing the Noo-Noo tidies up their Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot. The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely. The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The mysterious aliens whose artifacts the Maximals and Predacons have been stumbling across arrive.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers
