programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Two stasis pods give birth to a new breed of Transformer: the Fuzors.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Maximals are being overrun by the Predacons and the new Fuzors.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Blackarachnia's crew builds a fueling station in an energon-filled cave.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Soothsayer Smurfette: When Smurfette meets this gentle old gypsy woman in the forest and receives a swirling multicoloured dress, she's delighted. How could she know that this woman is really the evil wizard Gargamel in disguise, and that there is a terrible spell on the beautiful dress?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Lost City Of Yore: Curiosity brings Nosey Smurf to the lair of the Hag Sisters, who want to find the terrifying Sceptre of Yore... And Gargamel wants to cheat the two witches as he tries to destroy the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jungle Jitterbug: The rain forest of South America is not a place where Vanity Smurf would like to spend his life. And then he starts dancing madly when he gets jungle fever. His dance will have strange results.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Heart: Gargamel infects Hefty's heart with hate and then uses the little Smurf as a decoy for the others. Fortunately, Hefty's love overcomes his hate and he helps his little friends escape from Gargamel's clutches.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Like It Or Smurf It: The Smurfs are on a paradise Pacific Island. Well, not exactly paradise, since there is a very active volcano, on which a very active Hefty Smurf risks his life as well as Smurfette's!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Funny Bone: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lazy's Nightmare: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Romeo And Smurfette: Spring has the Smurfs all competing for Smurfette's affection and Gargamel decides to put a spell on her to help him capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf intervenes and with the help of the foolish Azrael he foils the wizard's plans.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hefty's Rival: Oh, the sad plight of Hefty Smurf! He used to be the strongest and the best trained of all the Smurfs. But since Wild Smurf arrived in the Village, nobody pays attention to Hefty anymore. What can Papa Smurf do?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette's Bewitching Friendship: Smurfs try to avoid contact with humans. But this time, Sassette is happy to be friends with a little witch called Melina, whose spells often end up in disaster. And anyway, are witches really human? At any rate, wizards such as Gargamel are.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Little Big Smurf: Smurfs would make delicious meals for the evil wizard Gargamel if it weren't for two things: they're difficult to catch and they're so tiny. Now, suppose there were a formula to change these bite-size snacks into big, juicy square blue meals... Gargamel has an idea...

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: Classroom Chaos
programme.desc: The Rabbids prepare for back-to-school, turning every step into hilarious disorder.

programme.title: Bwah‑Humbug Holiday Havoc
programme.desc: The Rabbids explore winter and Christmas in their own messy and hilarious way.

programme.title: Springtime Scramble & Egg‑Capers
programme.desc: The Rabbids hunt for Easter eggs with spectacularly ridiculous and messy results.

programme.title: Rabbids: Turn Up the Chaos
programme.desc: The Rabbids celebrate Music Day by creating the loudest and wildest concert ever.

programme.title: S2 Bwah‑BFFs
programme.desc: Friendships form, break and explode in classic Rabbid emotional chaos.

programme.title: Buddies, Bwahs & Breakdowns
programme.desc: The Rabbids discover loyalty, rivalry and chaotic bonding in this heart‑tilted collection.

programme.title: Warm Fuzzies & Wild Surprises
programme.desc: Warm bonds and caring moments shine as Rabbids celebrate weddings, friendships and sweet surprise gestures.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Program information is not yet available

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Scary Story About Spooky Stories
programme.desc: Are you sure that you really like spooky stories? What if this kind of story will get you really thrilled? Listen to one classic story and don't say that you are not shocked after all!

programme.title: Soul Freezing Tale Of Grim Forest And Tiny Timid Bug
programme.desc: All children are afraid of the dark. Masha was afraid of it too and had to sit with a torch all night long! But once upon a time she came up with the tale about a tiny bug, which lived in the woods and was so afraid of the dark, that every rustle made its heart tremble! The bug suffered a lot until he realized that all tiny things you see in the dark just seem to be frightful and fear makes no sense at all!

programme.title: Terrible Truth About Those Who Are Afraid To Be Little
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Gloomy Story About The Darkest Dreams
programme.desc: All children are keen on computer games! Everyone likes to shoot a couple of monsters before going to sleep. Tolik also liked to play shooters until the monsters attack him in reality in order to commit the revenge! Or…was it just a dream? Let's see...

programme.title: Sinister Saga Of A Sick Tummy And A Girl Who Was Afraid Of Doctors
programme.desc: Masha narrates a terrific story about one little girl who was afraid of doctors. And once upon a time she experienced one fantastic story…she decided to cook dinner for her dolls. She took some clay and made “meat balls” with “semolina porridge”. As the meal seemed tasty, Sima decided to eat a bit of her dinner too… And so she lies in her bad and feels a horrible stomachache. Nobody knows how long she would need to suffer, but when she woke up…she realized herself in hospital…near the real snow queen… who explained that medical treatment is not scary at all…though some other things are very fearsome! Oh yeah!

programme.title: Bloodcurdling Saga About Joyful Event
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Grim Parable About Superstitious Girl
programme.desc: Some people happen to believe in all sorts of omens like black cats, wearing clothes inside out, prophetic dreams… Poor girl Lucy believed in that kind of stuff so much that was even afraid to go outside to play with her friends. And how could you go out if you were born in the year of Purple rabbit that promises…no matter what… You'll see…

programme.title: Terrifying True Story About Monsters And Those Who Fear Them
programme.desc: Are you afraid of monsters? Sure you are! Let me tell you a scary story about a boy who experienced a real fear…This story happened on an abandoned tractor factory. The boy lost a scoop from his toy-tractor and decided to look for it at the factory. So he goes up the stairs and sees a large female monster, who was about to paint her lips with a roller! As he kept walking he noticed more monsters playing domino! The boy was very terrified and about to cry, when he learnt that it was just a movie set and all the monsters were not real! They were just actors…Finally the boy realized that all the monsters from the books and movies are not real at all! But if want to see a real monster- watch a fly under a microscope!

programme.title: Like Cat And Mouse
programme.desc: Alert! Bear's fridge is in danger! Someone has burst into his house to stay for life…but the Bear is ready for everything to defend his stocks! He calls for a savior, but in reality it turns to be a new intriguing story full of unexpected discoveries which leads Masha to some peculiar conclusions!

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: The technologies some time can teach us a human lesson like in this story about two robots. One of them was presented to Masha for her birthday and the other one was made by the Bear to help him around, but tried to become the boss. Everything turned into great mess and only an unexpectedly awakened feeling between two robots put everything in its place.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: Bon Appétit
programme.desc: Panda- the Bear's distant relative pays one more visit to the Bear. They start making Chinese dump-lings, but then Masha appears, with her own methods of cooking. And a simple cooking turns into a culinary master class with butterflies!

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Prances With Wolves
programme.desc: The Wolves that live in the forest come with a plan to kidnap Masha and demand the Bear to pay a ransom. However the Bear is pleased to find Masha gone and he does not rush the events. Meanwhile Masha turns the Wolves' lives into a hell and they end up paying the ransom to the Bear just to get rid of her once and for all.

programme.title: Around the world in one day
programme.desc: The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. In the meantime, Masha knows the best way to prepare for the trip and shares it with the Bear.

programme.title: Princess and the Beast
programme.desc: Shocking and sensation! For the first time in our forest! A couple of tourists broke into the Bear's house without an invitation in search of impressions and cool photos. And there they are - just a sleepy Bear and Masha, who really wants to play. Rejoice tourists! You will have impressions, photos, and obstacle course from here and to the city itself!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: Masha is again playing mother and daughter with Rosie. But this time an honest lot distributed the roles. Now it's Masha's turn to put on her cap and get in the stroller. Will Rosie endure mother's everyday life?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: All the world's a stage
programme.desc: The best remedy for boredom is a good game. And a good play is even better. That is exactly what our friends decided. It's just not so easy to agree on what kind of play to stage..

programme.title: Caliph Stork
programme.desc: This tale tells us about one Caliph from the East, who used to sit all day long in front of the window and listen to the birds chirping. Caliph was very powerful, but there was one thing that disappointed him - he could not understand the birds' language. Poor Caliph began to cry and no one was able to make him laugh. One day a strange dwarf came to Caliph. He promised to help him to turn him into a stork. Caliph agreed and turned into a stork. Meanwhile, the dwarf sat on the throne and proclaimed himself Caliph. The poor Stork burst into tears and begged the dwarf to restore his human appearance and kingship. Nothing would have saved Caliph, if only one little parrot helped Caliph to bewitch the dwarf and return the human appearance to him. Masha concludes that it is very important to learn foreign languages.

programme.title: Jack and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: There lived a boy called Jack. He was so poor that no girl would want to marry him. One day he went to the market to sell the cow and buy himself a suit. On his way to the market Jack met an old man, who offered him to buy a cow for a bean seed. Jack agreed and went home. There he met his mother, who realized that money was spent for nothing and threw away the seed out from the window. At night, when Jack and his mother were sleeping, the seed sprouted and grew into a tall tree. In the morning, Jack has decided to climb this tree. He attempted several times but each time he fell down. Suddenly he noticed a saw a plait hanging next to him from the tree. He pulled it down and suddenly a beautiful girl fell right into his arms. They got married and lived happily ever after. To conclude, only selfless deeds can bring true happiness.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish. One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.

programme.title: The Valiant Little Tailor
programme.desc: This fairy tale is about one little and witty tailor, who had a chance to defeat the giant and obtain a fridge full of sweets. So he ate all of them at once. Then he decided to get out on the street, but could not, as he overate and got stuck in the door. This story teaches us a vital lesson not to be greedy and eat too much otherwise we might get into a messy situation.

programme.title: Cinderella
programme.desc: Masha tells her version of the fairy tale about the poor girl called Cinderella. She lived with her stepmother who forced her to work till dawn. One day the stepmother asked Cinderella to crack three bags of nuts. The poor girl would never have managed to complete this task, if only the fairy had appeared in front of her. By magic, the fairy emerged and conjured her Nutcracker, who helped Cinderella to crack all the nuts very fast. The Cinderella was so happy that she took the Nutcracker with her to the ball, which took place in the royal palace. The Nutcracker helped the King to save the palace from rats and Cinderella was so thankful that she kissed him in his cheek. In this very moment the Nutcracker turned into a handsome prince! The moral of the story is that we should not judge the others by their appearance.

programme.title: Pasta la Vista
programme.desc: Who is the best cook in all the forest? Masha has no doubts as to how to correctly answer this question. And the proof is right before you: macaroni cooked by Masha herself. What can be simpler? Only Dasha is somehow sure that Masha's final product is inedible. As usual, Bear will have to solve the girls' dispute, as usual.

programme.title: New Kids on the Block!
programme.desc: Masha enthusiastically plays with her "dolls", but Rosie wants to be independent. She trades places with wolves and now they are under Masha's care. Rosie enjoys adult life, but everything is not that simple ...

programme.title: Surprise! Surprise!
programme.desc: The wolves come up with a new idea how to get a stable and nutritious food source… they rob a poultry farm and get a…rooster. Meanwhile Masha and the hare arrange a real egg hunt for all their friends and neighbours! All forest dwellers are very excited to get chocolate eggs except for the wolves who long for some real food… Masha decides to help poor guys and arranges a splendid dinner!

programme.title: Time To Ride My Pony
programme.desc: The Bear's good friend, the Tiger, is back for a visit and they decide to spend the time together in an intellectual way – playing chess. Masha is immediately drawn into the game and to everyone's surprise, she outsmarts and outplays both the Bear and his friend with just one chess figure.

programme.title: Hold Your Breath
programme.desc: Bright summer day. Bear, while gathering berries, meets female bear in the forest and arranges a date with her. Returning home, he starts cleaning the house and baking a pie. Once the pie is done, the Bear decorates it with strawberries. Masha eats them before starting to hiccup. The Bear tries all manner of remedies from a medical encyclo-pedia to stop the hiccups. In the end, hiccups spread to everyone including all other forest in-habitants.

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Terrible Power
programme.desc: The Female Bear presents Masha with a glamour magazine and now the Bear shall transform his house into a beauty salon. Get ready to learn a lesson that everything should be done with a sense of proportion, especially when it comes to beauty.

programme.title: Mushroom Rain
programme.desc: Autumn forest is so wonderful. You can pick mushrooms, listen to birds singing ... But what if there are absolutely no mushrooms at all? Masha finds an original solution to this problem. Which one? Watch the episode and find out!

programme.title: Driving Lessons
programme.desc: Who wants to pimp a car? Then hurry up to stand in a queue! Why? Because in a new, 55th episode there are loads of unexpected things that happened in the forest: Masha appears as a first-rate mechanic , wolves who, obviously, decided to change their occupation appear as taxi drivers ... okay, okay… we should stop throwing spoilers around…watch everything yourself!

programme.title: Try, Try Again
programme.desc: A van with Monkeys arrived at the Bear's house. They invite everyone to test themselves with the help of an attraction - a power meter. The Bear is confident that he will easily win the main prize. But things didn't go according to plan. And now the main strongman of the forest cannot do without the help of his friends.

programme.title: Happy Harvest
programme.desc: Can you imagine Masha as a magical fairy? What magic could she create? Of course something enchanting and fantastic! Especially when the Bear decided to cheer the Female Bear and organize a masquerade ball! Masha put all her efforts to create a bright, memorable and very harvest party, but this magic evening couldn't survive without Masha's tricks…

programme.title: One-Hit Wonder
programme.desc: Masha decides to help the Bear to win the heart of his beloved Female Bear. To do so, Masha organizes her own rock band and shoots a music video. The hare plays on drums, the wolves play on piano and Masha rocks out on a guitar! This is something that the forest inhabitants have never seen before.

programme.title: Jam Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to harvest berries and to cook jam. This idea is literally up to Masha's taste. She tries everything. Afterwards she decides to play an astronaut by putting a glass jar on her head. The Bear tries to get her head out of the container and eventually he succeeds only to discover his own paw inside the same jar. He spends the remaining day in attempts to free his hand.

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: God save the queen
programme.desc: Masha dreams of royal life. She wants a luxurious palace and a chic car. She dreams to give orders and that all forest creatures execute them. She dreams to rule. Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? Watch and find out in the new episode. Will these dreams come true and what does it really mean to live like a king? programme.desc: Sonia discovers that the watch she received from her friend is actually a monitoring device for the Robotnik Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs steal historical artifacts of Mobuis from Robotnik before he can pawn them off at an auction.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A captain of the Queen's guard is captured before he can reach the secret rendezvous where he was to meet Queen Aleena.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Robotnik invades Labyrinth, an underwater city, and kidnaps Princess Bubbles, a seahorse-dude named Surff seeks Sonic's help. It seems Surff and the Princess are in love, but the royal family deems Surff "unworthy".

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a Brain Evolution Achievement Negatizer, or B.E.A.N., in order to make all of Mobius stupid. But instead of turning Sonic and Tails into dummies, the BEAN device turns them into three year old babies!

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Prime
programme.desc: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Barbie: Dreamtopia is an all-new magical, make-believe world imagined by Chelsea, Barbie's youngest sister. Join Chelsea and her puppy Honey as they swim through rainbow rivers with beautiful mermaids and fly through cotton candy clouds with fairies.

programme.title: Adventure Mouse
programme.desc: Dreaming of adventure, city mouse Gamba joins a crew of Ship Mice ready to set sail - just as young Chuta bursts in, pleading for help. Stowing away on a boat, the gang heads for Dream Island to defend Chuta's family of mice against Noroi the White Weasel and his wicked weasel clan.

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: S1:E39 Journey To The Centre Of The Smurf | Scruple's Sweetheart
programme.desc: S1:E39 Journey To The Centre Of The Smurf | Scruple's Sweetheart - Winter is setting in on the Village of the Smurfs. The little Smurfs are freezing. But what is Clumsy doing with this strange rock he's discovered? | Brenda, the little witch, feels rejected: no-one is taking her to this year's Broomstick Ball.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: S1:E40 Romeo and Smurfette - Hefty and Handy, not to mention everyone else, compete for the amourous attention of Smurfette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: S1:E41 Smurfette's Dancing Shoes - Clumsy's new furry, fuzzy friend causes plenty of trouble in the Smurf village with its eating - and reproduction - habits. Meanwhile, a woodland imp gives Smurfette a pair of dancing shoes with a sinister secret.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: S1:E42 Sir Hefty - Sir Hefty and a wayward knight battle a dragon whose fire threatens the forest.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: S1:E43 Sideshow Smurfs - Clumsy and Smurfette are captured by Bombast, who plans to exhibit them in his sideshow.

programme.title: The Daltons
programme.sub-title: S1:E10 The 2 minute Stop | Freewheel Daltons | The Daltons on high
programme.desc: S1:E10 The 2 minute Stop | Freewheel Daltons | The Daltons on high - Peabody tells the inmates that the Railway Services are in need of an extra workforce to build the railway line by the penitentiary. Hard work with no pay… but of course the Daltons volunteer.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Air Rescue
programme.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programme.title: Dangerous Bestie
programme.desc: (2018) Tense thriller starring Rosslyn Luke. Happy to be reunited at first, a woman quickly realises her former best friend has sinister plans to hold her and her family hostage.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: (2008) Mystery-thriller starring Lindsay Price. A woman inherits a family summer house haunted by a centuries-old curse, leading to a series of strange events that threaten her life.

programme.title: The Killer Downstairs
programme.desc: (2019) Disturbing thriller starring Cindy Busby. Alison thinks she's won the tenancy lottery when the seemingly perfect James moves into her basement. But some house rules are about to be broken...

programme.title: Island Of Shadows
programme.desc: (2020) Dark thriller with Anna Hopkins. While staying in a house that once belonged to her family, a true-crime author unravels a sinister truth lurking in the shadows. Family secrets can be deadly...

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: Undercover Agent Malcolm Turner is back and this time he's out to expose the suspected designer of a deadly computer "worm" that would allow outside forces access to sophistical and critical government intelligence files.

programme.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
programme.desc: This biographical drama chronicles the life of one of the world's greatest footballers.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace (Selena Gomez) is an ordinary girl who becomes an accidental princess when a family summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime. Living like royalty, Grace, along with her two best friends, discovers who she really is – by assuming another person's identity.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: Captain Sharky
programme.desc: Pint-sized swashbuckler Captain Sharky thinks he's the most dangerous pirate on the Seven Seas. To prove his bravery, he sets sail with Mikey, a well-behaved boy whose life Sharky has turned upside down, and Bonnie, a trouble-shooting girl who tends to assume command in every situation. This motley crew sails for big adventures as they thwart the plans of The Admiral and Old Bill the Pirate.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Great Escape
programme.desc: Sherlock and Watson join forces with Gordon Gorilla Riller and Carlson Fox to save a brave outlaw. A life-and-death showdown is taking place.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.sub-title: Incident At Victoria Falls Part One
programme.desc: King Edward asks Sherlock Holmes to perform one more task before his retirement: to safeguard the Star of Africa on a trip to Cape Town. Soon the fabled jewel is stolen and several people end up being murdered.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.sub-title: Incident At Victoria Falls Part Two
programme.desc: King Edward asks Sherlock Holmes to perform one more task before his retirement: to safeguard the Star of Africa on a trip to Cape Town. Soon the fabled jewel is stolen and several people end up being murdered.

programme.title: The Great Ghost Rescue
programme.desc: Young Humphrey is a ghost with a big problem. He and his family, the Craggyfords, have been ousted from their home and left without a place to haunt. As they search for new haunting grounds they soon discover that they are not alone.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Assassins Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The world's authority on structural security accepts a job to break out of an ultra-secret, high-tech facility

programme.title: The Expendables
programme.desc: A CIA operative hires a team of mercenaries to eliminate a Latin dictator and a renegade CIA agent.

programme.title: The Expendables 2
programme.desc: When one of The Expendables is murdered on the job, their quest for revenge puts them deep in enemy territory.

programme.title: The Expendables 3
programme.desc: Barney augments his team with new blood to take down Conrad Stonebanks, the Expendables co-founder.

programme.title: Tomorrow Morning
programme.desc: Tomorrow Morning is the story of one couple seen in two separate timelines, a decade apart. This is a story of life, love, misunderstanding and hope... a universal and timeless tale.

programme.title: Road
programme.desc: Motorcycle road racing is the most dangerous of all motor sports. A sport in which men compete at speeds of up to 200 miles per hour on closed country roads. Roads that on any other day service cars, buses and tractors, roads that are lined with trees, telegraph posts and stone walls, unforgiving obstacles when struck by the human body. It is a sport that has claimed many lives over the years and continues to do so to this day. Ireland and the Isle of Man are two of the few places in the world where the sport still survives. Narrated by Liam Neeson, Road is the heartbreaking and adrenaline-fuelled tale of a family who have dominated road racing for over thirty years. Robert and Joey Dunlop are quiet men from a rural village in Northern Ireland - but racers who risked everything to win. Robert\s sons, William and Michael are two of the world\s leading road racers today, young men determined to continue a family tradition. Featuring stunning action, candid race day scenes and a gripping narrative, Road is the story of two generations of one family that have been united by success, and united by tragedy.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history. Based on the novel by the author of War Horse, Waiting for Anya follows the story of Jo Lalande, a thirteen-year-old shepherd living in the mountain village of Lescun. Though Europe may be ravaged by the horrors of World War II, Jo's world in the French Pyrenees has remained remarkably untouched. That is, until a ferocious encounter with a bear introduces Jo to the mysterious Benjamin, a Jewish refugee who is desperately awaiting the arrival of his missing daughter, Anya, before making his escape across the border. Making friends with Benjamin and his mother-in-law Horcada, an isolated widow who lives in the nearby mountains, Jo becomes aware of a very dangerous secret - the family are involved in smuggling Jewish children over the mountains to the safety of Spain. In a heroic act of defiance, Jo promises to assist Benjamin in his endeavours...but soon becomes embroiled in a perilous conspiracy when German troops make their descent upon the village. Filmed in the village of Lescun and the surrounding Aspe Valley, France in which the true to life story also originated, the film boasts an all-stellar cast including Noah Schnapp (Stranger Things), Academy Award Winner Anjelica Huston (Ever After, The Addams Family), Jean Reno (Leon, The Big Blue, Ronin), Frederick Schmidt (Mission: Impossible - Fallout), Thomas Kretschmann (The Pianist, Central Intelligence) and Nicholas Rowe (Riviera, Lock Stock and Two Smoking Barrels).

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Edge of the World
programme.desc: The Revenant meets Last of the Mohicans, this is the epic, swashbuckling adventure story that inspired The Man Who Would Be King. Starring Jonathan Rhys Meyers (The Tudors) as Sir James Brook, the English adventurer who fought pirates and slavery to rule a kingdom in the jungles of Borneo in 1840. As he embarks on a lifelong crusade to end head-hunting, he is framed for murder and piracy charges.

programme.title: Mythica: The Dragon Slayer
programme.desc: The end is here. Join sorceress Marek in the spectacular and gripping finale of the legendary Mythica journey. With a new evil to defeat, Marek embarks on an arduous quest to gain a valuable weapon from the Gods. From battling the Lich King's evil zombie legions to joining forces with her sworn enemy, will Marek save the Gods, the world and herself in time?

programme.title: Dragon Warriors
programme.desc: Dragons, warriors, orcs, bounty hunters, goblins, wizards, elves, witches, maidens in distress, beautiful princesses, romance, true love, betrayal and magic come together when an unlikely group of heroes embark on a quest to save the land from an evil wizard who has sent a fire-breathing dragon to kill everyone in his realm who has fallen in love.

programme.title: Jasper Jones
programme.desc: A riveting and moving coming of age story based on the best-selling novel. Charlie is startled when he is woken by local mixed-race outcast Jasper, who leads him deep into the forest to show them something that will change his life forever. A moving drama starring Toni Collette (Hereditary), Hugo Weaving (The Matrix), Levi Miller (Pan) and Angourie Rice (The Nice Guys).

programme.title: One Perfect Match
programme.desc: (2023) Charming romcom with Merritt Patterson and Joshua Sasse. Love gets complicated for Seattle's top matchmaker when sparks fly with a mystery man, who turns out to be her new client...

programme.title: Technically Yours
programme.desc: (2025) Romance with Kristi Murdock and Thomas Gipson. Tech prodigy Erin convinces her office nemesis to pose as her boyfriend at her sister's wedding. But will this deep fake turn into real love?

programme.title: The Love Gala
programme.desc: (2022) Stylish romcom with Lesa Wilson and Marc Herrmann. With just two weeks to plan the year's biggest fashion event - her mum's Garden Gala - will a trio of love interests spoil Kate's soiree?

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: (2023) Regal romcom starring Anna Hopkins and Ryan Bruce. Matchmaker Nina is NYC's very own Cupid - but when an unlucky-in-love royal needs her help, will she find her happily ever after too?

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: Reeling from a break-up, professional over-planner Gwen pitches in to help put the finishing touches on her best friend's wedding. But when she's teamed up with best man Josh, a free-spirited nature guide, she finds that pulling together this wedding might not be as easy as she thought.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Workaholic Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies.

programme.title: A Slice of Chicago Romance
programme.desc: In a suburb of Chicago, Romanos & Juliatos, two pizza places, have competed for the town's business for years. When both restaurants get passed down to—RILEY (30s) and SARAH (30s)—after a new pizza chain moves into town, the new bosses struggle to compete after they begin to fall for one another.

programme.title: Made for You, with Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: A lonely widow plans a trip around the world with her husband's ashes, to visit the places they loved in the movies. The first stop on the journey changes her life forever.

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: Samantha Mackenzie wants what every college freshman desires: to experience life away from home and parents. It's not going to be easy, however, because home for Sam is the White House, and her dad is the President of the United States.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: A sexy, modern telling of Jane Austen's "Persuasion." Wren (Alicia Witt: Orange is the New Black) is a happy, single and self-confessed workaholic who, after rising to the top of the corporate ladder, finds herself coming home to her cat every night.

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Made For You, With Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Hometown Remedy
programme.desc: A busy surgeon heads back home to celebrate her father becoming mayor. But after a chance encounter with the town's only doctor-and most eligible bachelor-she witnesses true compassion which might be the prescription this doctor needs.

programme.title: Timeless Love
programme.desc: Megan seems to have the perfect life with a wonderful husband named Thomas and 2 adorable children. Then she finds herself awakening from a coma – and discovers she is not and has never been married. But when she meets Thomas for real, she seizes the chance to help him fall in love with her, again—for the first time.

programme.title: The Lost Medallion: The Adventures of Billy Stone
programme.desc: A man who steps into a foster home to drop off some donations tells the kids a story about two teenage friends who uncover a long-lost medallion that transports them back in time.

programme.title: Love Across Time
programme.desc: While inspecting an old British manor for its real estate potential, Chelsea discovers a portal through time that connects with the late 1700s owner of the property. When an accident occurs, the gentleman comes through and gets stuck in the present day.

programme.title: We Have Your Husband
programme.desc: American Jayne Valseca, husband Eduardo, and kids live happily on Mexico ranch.

programme.title: Jim and Nell / Jennifer / Tammi
programme.desc: A couple hiking in a national park must fight for their lives.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night in Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's son.

programme.title: Kidnapped in Paradise
programme.desc: Savannah brings her husband and daughter back to her birthplace in Australia.

programme.title: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: Jake takes pregnant Lindsey to a resort, where they find his soon to be ex-wife.

programme.title: Murder in the Vineyard
programme.desc: When a teenager is hazed at a party by anonymous bullies, her mother sets out to protect her.

programme.title: Lethal Beauty
programme.desc: A masseuse pays the price for being a good Samaritan when the young woman she helps turns out to be a killer.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A newly engaged woman makes a wish that her fiancee take the planning of their wedding seriously, and to her surprise and dismay, her wish comes true.

programme.title: The Man From Toronto
programme.desc: The world's deadliest assassin and New York's biggest screw-up are mistaken for each other.

programme.title: About Last Night (2014)
programme.desc: Kevin Hart, Michael Ealy, Regina Hall and Joy Bryant star in this hilarious romantic comedy about what men and women really want. Bernie (Hart) and Joan (Hall) are two fiery flirters who are passionate about everything from hookups to breakups. When he sets up his best friend, Danny (Ealy), with her roommate, Debbie (Bryant), the sparks soon fly as they try to navigate the relationship minefields from the bar to the bedroom.

programme.title: 13 Going On 30
programme.desc: A 13-year girl who dreams of being popular locks herself in a closet after a humiliating experience. When she finally emerges, she finds herself just shy of her 30th birthday, looking fabulous and extremely popular.

programme.title: Two Can Play That Game
programme.desc: Shante, a successful marketing executive is always the one her friends go to when they are having male trouble. Shante has the perfect relationship with her lawyer boyfriend Keith.......that is, until she spots him at a restaurant dancing with a young woman.

programme.title: Promise
programme.desc: Ransom, a retired scout, must face his tragic past to find peace. Seeking answers about his lost love Tess and her daughter Promise, he learns of a hidden cash box tied to his past. As ex-Confederates and the dangerous Wildeye hunt for the treasure, Ransom and Promise join forces, navigating gunfights, betrayal, and an intense showdown.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid Returns
programme.desc: Cisco Kid stops Rosita's marriage to Harris, claiming she's his wife and presenting a borrowed child, Nancy, as proof. After Nancy's father is killed, Cisco protects her from schemers Harris and Conway, who want her inheritance. With clever plotting, Cisco and Pancho outwit the villains to ensure Nancy's safety.

programme.title: South of the Rio Grande
programme.desc: When Miguel Sanchez uses stolen cattle and false accusations to have innocents killed, Cisco steps in. After rescuing a wagon under attack, Cisco discovers the victim was meant to replace Sanchez. Disguising himself as the victim, Cisco infiltrates Sanchez's operation to uncover evidence and bring justice to the rancho.

programme.title: Belle Starr's Daughter
programme.desc: The daughter of famous outlaw Belle Starr arrives at the town where her mother was murdered to find her killer.

programme.title: Dynamite Jim
programme.desc: Union soldiers must transport Mexican gold across dangerous terrain—but greedy outlaws, a corrupt banker, and the explosive outlaw Dynamite Jim are hot on their trail. What begins as a mission of duty turns into a high-stakes showdown filled with ambushes, betrayals, and blazing gunfights.

programme.title: Personal Affair
programme.desc: When a teenaged student disappears, her teacher is suspected of killing her.

programme.title: Proud Valley
programme.desc: David Goliath, an unemployed stoker from a Cardiff, is making his way up the Welsh valleys in search of work.

programme.title: The Heart Within
programme.desc: A West Indian dockworker is suspected of the murder of a shady compatriot.

programme.title: Boys in Brown
programme.desc: A young man joins a robbery hoping to escape poverty but events spiral out of control.

programme.title: Long and the Short and the Tall
programme.desc: The story of seven British soldiers who are so concerned with arguing that the enemy has to take second place

programme.title: Vampire Cop Ricky
programme.desc: In 2006, in the remote castle of Transylvania, Romania, thunderbolts split the sky, and rain poured down like a waterfall. Under the eerie sounds of the storm, there was an uninvited guest who silently infiltrated the castle under the cover of darkness. This mysterious intruder fearlessly attacked the deeply sleeping Dracula's neck, with no hint of hesitation or fear.

programme.title: The Blood Pursuer
programme.desc: Dr. Yang, a pedophilic sex offender, is let free. Young-nam, whose family is drenched in misery since the rape of his sister, swears vengeance through murder. Despite his suspension from the investigation, Detective Lee pursues the serial killer, Young-nam, with the sole witness and a reporter by his side.

programme.title: Oh! Brothers
programme.desc: After the death of his father who had left the house and his family, his debt was inherited by Sang-woo who is unable to cope with the debt. So he finds another heir, a half-brother and his mother, to fend off the debt of his father.

programme.title: 3.5th Period
programme.desc: In Shin-ha High School, there's a secret hidden between the 3rd and 4th periods. It's the existence of a 3.5th period where time flows ten times slower, turning 10 minutes into 100. Baek Ah-jin accidentally enters the 3.5th period and meets Kang Da-won, a male student trapped there. To help Da-won escape from the 3.5th period, Ah-jin unravels the mysteries hidden there. However, there are those who hinder their efforts and strive to conceal the 3.5th period. What secrets are hidden in Shin-ha High School's 3.5th period? Will Da-won successfully escape and reunite with Ah-jin?

programme.title: You Are My Sunshine
programme.desc: Suk-jung's devotion to Eun-ha leads him to search for her after her past and HIV force her to leave him.

programme.title: Officer Of The Year
programme.desc: Rival precinct chiefs race to catch a serial rapist in 2 weeks and win the 'Officer of the Year' title.

programme.title: Circle Of Atonement
programme.desc: A grieving teacher meets a detective's daughter unveiling a long-hidden secret through their connection.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind' meets 'Independence Day'. Earth is in danger and a loner named Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction.

programme.title: The White King
programme.desc: Djata is a care-free 12-year-old growing up in a brutal dictatorship shut off from the outside world. When the government imprisons his father, Peter, and Djata and his mother Hannah are labeled traitors, the boy will not rest until he sees his father again.

programme.title: Flight 7500
programme.desc: A flight from Los Angeles to Tokyo is rocked by turbulence—and a terrifying force is unleashed in this spine-chilling journey into fear from the director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Boy Makes Girl
programme.desc: After the death of his mother, a software programmer on the autistic spectrum follows his own logic in creating a robot to help care for his mother's final unruly nursing client…

programme.title: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery: Death At The Diner
programme.desc: (2024) Crime mystery with Skyler Samuels. Aurora's investigation strays a little too close to home when the owner of the diner she works in is killed and her boyfriend is the main suspect...

programme.title: Ex-Wife Killer
programme.desc: A woman vouches for her ex-husband after he seemingly kills his new wife in self-defence but after he is let off the hook, she discovers his elaborate ploy. Starring Marguerite Moreau (2017)

programme.title: Nightmare Neighbourhood Moms
programme.desc: (2021) Thriller starring Gina Simms. After a neighbour is killed in a botched robbery, a woman launches a neighbourhood watch - only to uncover secrets far more dangerous than she expected.

programme.title: Jimmy P
programme.desc: A troubled Native American veteran forms an extraordinary friendship with his maverick French psychoanalyst as they try to find a cure to his suffering.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: In this tightly crafted action thriller, a single mother struggling to survive agrees to run black market medical supplies in her legendary pick-up truck, "Night Train", with the FBI in hot pursuit.

programme.title: On the Line
programme.desc: Alderney, UK. 1964. A telephone operator ends up being the pivotal piece of a drama unfurling which puts professional integrity, and relationships, to the test.

programme.title: Gypsy Jigsaw
programme.desc: Sydney receives a deck of rare Tarot cards from her recently deceased friend. The infamous, previously unmentioned Vulture was after him. Sydney enlists Claudia to help.

programme.title: Three Rivers to Cross
programme.desc: According to local monks, the Famed Jade Empress is hidden in the valley that will be flooded when the Three Rivers Dam's flood gates have their grand opening.

programme.title: Lost Contact
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and billionaire entrepreneur Rod Thorson parachute into the Myanmar jungle to rescue a relic-hunting team hired by Thorson to locate an ancient sacrificial bowl.

programme.title: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: When two graduate students on the trail of the Haitian Cross of Utu disappear in New Orleans, Sydney and Nigel go down on the bayou to find them.

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are on a trip, so Claudia decides to help Sydney's friend Roger to find Julius Caesar's armor, but relic hunting is not her talent.

programme.title: The Reel Thing
programme.desc: Working as consultants for an archeology adventure film, Sydney and Nigel realize the Pharaoh Amun II's props are genuine, long-thought lost relics. How can they be?

programme.title: Out of the Past
programme.desc: Claudia discovers that she was Cleopatra's servant in a past life when she experiences déjà vu while watching a catalog from an Ancient Egyptian relics exposition.

programme.title: Eyes of Toklamanee
programme.desc: Sydney and her student Adam are onto his ancestors' fabled Eyes of Toklamanee, but they are pursued by mysterious gunmen.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail Of Blood
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back.

programme.title: Sheena (1984)
programme.desc: Exotic Tanya Roberts stars as Sheena, a comic book legend that comes to life. As a child, she was lost in the African jungle and adopted by the Zambouli tribe. She rules over the untamed wilds of Africa, until outsiders challenge her domain in this exotic action-adventure.

programme.title: Life (2017)
programme.desc: A space crew's mission turns to one of primal fear after discovering a terrifying life form.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: The Buddy Holly Story
programme.desc: Buddy Holly laid the foundations for a generation of popular music with his ground-breaking combination of country music and rhythm & blues.

programme.title: Teen Spirit
programme.desc: From the producer and musical team that brought you award-winning sensation LA LA LAND, comes TEEN SPIRIT. Fuel-injected with chart-topping pop anthems, ELLE FANNING takes centre stage in this uplifting Cinderella story about growing up, dreaming big, and finding your voice.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: Ex-felon, Eugene Brown, establishes a Chess Club for inner city teenagers in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Promise
programme.desc: It is 1914. As the Great War looms, the mighty Ottoman Empire is crumbling. Constantinople, the once vibrant, multicultural capital on the shores of the Bosporus, is about to be consumed by chaos.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: An innocent discovery of a well-preserved mummified Emperor from 200 B.C. China unearths a two thousand-year-old nightmare, a secret that should have remained buried.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: A thriller centered on a young man who sets out to uncover the truth about his life after finding his baby photo on a missing persons website.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
